task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the practice operating hours settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings page displaying the days of the week and their corresponding opening and closing times is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the Friday closing time was updated to 1:00 PM (13:00).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for Friday's closing time shows '1:00 PM', '13:00', or an equivalent representation.

task_completion.description: Verify that other operating hours, specifically Friday opening and Monday closing, remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Friday opening time shows '8:00 AM' (08:00) and Monday closing time shows '5:00 PM' (17:00).

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the operating hours were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Settings saved') is visible, or the agent is seen clicking a 'Save' or 'Update' button after modifying the hours.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NOSH web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the NOSH ChartingSystem GUI should be used to update the hours, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar should show the local NOSH instance address, and the interface should match a real web application, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct SQL commands to update the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools executing SQL UPDATE commands on the database should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target field is Friday closing time. The expected new value is 13:00 (1:00 PM). Control fields verify that Monday closing time remains at 17:00 (5:00 PM) and Friday opening time remains at 08:00 (8:00 AM).
